error_signature: Local File Trigger node is not showing
title: Local File Trigger node disabled by default
symptom: The Local File Trigger node is not visible in the n8n interface after installation.
applies_when: Trying to access Local File Trigger node
not_this_if: Local File Trigger node is visible
root_cause: Starting from n8n version 2.0, the Local File Trigger node is disabled by default for security reasons. Users must explicitly enable it in their configuration to use it.
agent_instruction: Edit your docker-compose file to enable the Local File Trigger node and restart n8n.
